title: Analyst warns BTC could drop further after worst June since 2022
summary: The June close above realized price but below the 200-week moving average “signals the bear bottom is still ahead per prior cycles,” one analyst said.

title: Venice AI becomes unicorn after $65M Series A as AI privacy concerns grow
summary: The funding round is Venice AI’s first external capital raise since it launched in May 2024.

title: India’s Textile Stocks Become Market Standouts on Trade Deals
summary: Indian suppliers of T-shirts, bed linen and towels to global retailers such as Walmart Inc. are among this year’s biggest stock-market winners, with some investors betting the rally has further to run.

title: US Tech Rout Sours Mood For Japan, South Korean Chip Stocks
summary: Japanese and South Korean semiconductor stocks tumbled Thursday after a selloff in US technology shares soured the mood across Asia. Meta Platforms Inc.’s plan to sell access to AI computing power also raised worries about oversupply.

title: Robinhood Launches 'AI-Native' Ethereum Layer-2 Network, Tokenized Stock Trading
summary: Brokerage and crypto exchange Robinhood opened the public mainnet for its Arbitrum-powered Ethereum layer-2 network on Wednesday.

title: Kalshi and Polymarket’s combined volume surges 75% to $45 billion in June amid World Cup fever
summary: Among the three, Kalshi saw the largest month-over-month increase in volume, growing 87.4% to $31.5 billion from $16.81 billion.
